summary: Decent recording with a solid first set highlighted by the heady Cassidy jam.
review: The reviewer finds the first set of this 1994 show reasonably good, noting that things start to heat up during “Loser” and reach a peak with a pretty heady jam on “Cassidy.” No major stand‑out moments are mentioned, and there is no comment on the recording source or sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; show quality described as average with a modest highlight, and no information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on soundboard vs. audience source or any audio clarity issues; therefore the technical quality cannot be assessed beyond being assumed fair.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as reasonably good, gaining momentum through “Loser” and peaking with a heady jam on “Cassidy,” but lacking any major standout moments.
